title: Chih-Wen Hsueh
text: Home * People * Chih-Wen Hsueh Chih-Wen Hsueh [1] Chih-Wen (Steven) Hsueh , a Taiwanese computer scientist and associate professor in the Graduate Institute of Networking and Multimedia and 'Department of Computer Science and Information Engineering at the National Taiwan University . He received his M.Sc. and Ph.D. degrees in CS from the University of Southern California and University of California at Irvine in 1994 and 1997 respectively. His research centers around real-time computing in particular peal-time operating systems , embedded systems , and intelligent systems [2] . Selected Publications [ edit ] [3] Tang-Hsun Tu, Chih-Wen Hsueh ( 2015 ). Introduction to Xen - A Hypervisor (on x86) . slides [4] Hung-Jui Chang , Chih-Wen Hsueh , Tsan-sheng Hsu ( 2015 ). Convergence and correctness analysis of Monte-Carlo tree search algorithms: A case study of 2 by 4 Chinese dark chess . CGW@IJCAI 2017 Hung-Jui Chang , Jr-Chang Chen , Gang-Yu Fan , Chih-Wen Hsueh , Tsan-sheng Hsu ( 2018 ). Using Chinese dark chess endgame databases to validate and fine-tune game evaluation functions .
